name: pavo
description: Manifest Anything: capture Plaud recordings, preserve real audio, and route transcription through Eidos tooling.

interface.shortDescription: Capture Plaud audio and manifest it for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Pavo routes Codex to the local pavo CLI for Plaud recording discovery, real-audio download, manifest inspection, and transcription orchestration through eidos-transcribe. The plugin is intentionally thin; the CLI/package remains the source of truth.
defaultPrompt: Use Pavo to list my latest Plaud recordings.
Use Pavo to download and transcribe a Plaud recording.
Use Pavo doctor to check Plaud, local config, and transcription readiness.
